verses.geez:
ወአንጐርጐረ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ በእኪት ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሰምዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወተምዐ ፡ መዐተ ፡ ወነደደ ፡ እሳት
                  ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወበልዐት ፡ አሐደ ፡ ኅብረ ፡ እምነ ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: And the people murmured sinfully before the Lord; and the Lord heard them and was very angry; and fire was kindled among them from the Lord, and devoured a part of the camp.
translations.kjv: And when the people complained, it displeased the LORD: and the LORD heard it; and his anger was kindled; and the fire of the LORD burnt among them, and consumed them that were in the uttermost parts of the camp.

verses.geez: ወጸርሐ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወጸለየ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወኀደገት ፡ እሳት ።

translations.lxx: And the people cried to Moses: and Moses prayed to the Lord, and the fire was quenched.
translations.kjv: And the people cried unto Moses; and when Moses prayed unto the LORD, the fire was quenched.

verses.geez: ወተሰምየ ፡ ስሙ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ መካን ፡ ውዕየት ፡ እስመ ፡ ነደደት ፡ እሳት ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the name of that place was called Burning; for a fire was kindled among them from the Lord.
translations.kjv: And he called the name of the place Taberah: because the fire of the LORD burnt among them.

verses.geez:
ወእለ ፡ ተደመሩሂ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ፈተዉ ፡ ፍትወተ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ወበከዩ ፡ ወደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤልኒ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ መኑ ፡
                  ያበልዐነ ፡ ሥጋ ።

translations.lxx: And the mixed multitude among them lusted exceedingly; and they and the children of Israel sat down and wept and said, Who shall give us flesh to eat?
translations.kjv: And the mixt multitude that was among them fell a lusting: and the children of Israel also wept again, and said, Who shall give us flesh to eat?

verses.geez:
ተዘከርነ ፡ ዝክተ ፡ ዓሣተ ፡ ዘንበልዕ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በከንቱ ፡ ወቍሳያቲሁ ፡ ወመልጰጶን ፡ ወስጕርደ ፡ ወበጸለ
                  ፡ ወሶመተ ።

translations.lxx: We remember the fish, which we ate in Egypt freely; and the cucumbers, and the melons, and the leeks, and the garlic, and the onions.
translations.kjv: We remember the fish, which we did eat in Egypt freely; the cucumbers, and the melons, and the leeks, and the onions, and the garlick:

verses.geez: ወይአዜሰ ፡ የብሰት ፡ ነፍስነ ፡ ዘአልብነ ፡ ባዕደ ፡ ዘንሬኢ ፡ እንበለ ፡ መና ።

translations.lxx: But now our soul is dried up; our eyes turn to nothing but to the manna.
translations.kjv: But now our soul is dried away: there is nothing at all, beside this manna, before our eyes.

verses.geez: ወመናሰ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ተቅዳ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወርእየቱ ፡ ከመ ፡ ርእየተ ፡ በረድ ።

translations.lxx: And the manna is as coriander seed, and the appearance of it the appearance of hoarfrost.
translations.kjv: And the manna was as coriander seed, and the colour thereof as the colour of bdellium.

verses.geez:
ወየሐውሩ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወይኤልዱ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ወየሐርጽዎ ፡ በማሕረጽ ፡ ወይዴቅቅዎ ፡ በመድቀቅት ፡ ወያበስልዎ ፡ በመቅጹት ፡
                  ወይገብርዎ ፡ ዳፍንተኒ ፡ ወጣዕሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ጣዕመ ፡ መዓር ፡ ምስለ ፡ ቅብእ ።

translations.lxx: And the people went through the field, and gathered, and ground it in the mill, or pounded it in a mortar, and baked it in a pan, and made cakes of it; and the sweetness of it was as the taste of wafer made with oil.
translations.kjv: And the people went about, and gathered it, and ground it in mills, or beat it in a mortar, and baked it in pans, and made cakes of it: and the taste of it was as the taste of fresh oil.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ይወርድ ፡ ጠል ፡ ዲበ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ይወርድ ፡ መናሂ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And when the dew came upon the camp by night, the manna came down upon it.
translations.kjv: And when the dew fell upon the camp in the night, the manna fell upon it.

verses.geez:
ወሰምዐ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይበክዩ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኆኅቱ ፡ ወተምዕዐ ፡ መዐተ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወበቅድመ ፡ ሙሴኒ ፡ እኩየ ፡ ኮነ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses heard them weeping by their families, every one in his door: and the Lord was very angry; and the thing was evil in the sight of Moses.
translations.kjv: Then Moses heard the people weep throughout their families, every man in the door of his tent: and the anger of the LORD was kindled greatly; Moses also was displeased.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ለምንት ፡ አሕሠምከ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቍልዔከ ፡ ወለምንት ፡ ኢረከብኩ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡ በቅድሜከ
                  ፡ ከመ ፡ ታግብእ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ መንሴቶ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said to the Lord, Why hast thou afflicted thy servant, and why have I not found grace in thy sight, that thou shouldest lay the weight of this people upon me?
translations.kjv: And Moses said unto the LORD, Wherefore hast thou afflicted thy servant? and wherefore have I not found favour in thy sight, that thou layest the burden of all this people upon me?

verses.geez:
ቦኑ ፡ አነ ፡ ፀነስክዎሙ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወቦኑ ፡ አነ ፡ ወለድክዎሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትበለኒ ፡ ንሥኦሙ ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ ሕፅንከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይነሥእዎ ፡ ለዘ ፡ የሐፅኑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ መሐልከ ፡ ለአበዊሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: Have I conceived all this people, or have I born them? that thou sayest to me, Take them into thy bosom, as a nurse would take her suckling, into the land which thou swarest to their fathers?
translations.kjv: Have I conceived all this people? have I begotten them, that thou shouldest say unto me, Carry them in thy bosom, as a nursing father beareth the sucking child, unto the land which thou swarest unto their fathers?

verses.geez:
እምአይቴ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ዘእሁብ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እስመ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ይበክዩ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ወይብሉኒ ፡ ሀበነ
                  ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ከመ ፡ ንብላዕ ።

translations.lxx: Whence have I flesh to give to all this people? for they weep to me, saying, Give us flesh, that we may eat.
translations.kjv: Whence should I have flesh to give unto all this people? for they weep unto me, saying, Give us flesh, that we may eat.

verses.geez: ወኢይክል ፡ አነ ፡ ባሕቲትየ ፡ ዐቂቦቶ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እስመ ፡ ይከብደኒ ።

translations.lxx: I shall not be able to bear this people alone, for this thing is too heavy for me.
translations.kjv: I am not able to bear all this people alone, because it is too heavy for me.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ትሬስየኒ ፡ ቀቲለ ፡ ቅትለኒ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ረብብኩ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይርአያ ፡
                  ለእኪትየ ።

translations.lxx: And if thou doest thus to me, slay me utterly, if I have found favour with thee, that I may not see my affliction.
translations.kjv: And if thou deal thus with me, kill me, I pray thee, out of hand, if I have found favour in thy sight; and let me not see my wretchedness.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ አስተጋብእ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ፸ብእሴ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አዕሩጊሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እለ
                  ፡ ታአምር ፡ ለሊከ ፡ ከመ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ሊቃናቱ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ወጸሐፍቶሙኒ ፡ ወታበውኦሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡
                  ወይቁሙ ፡ ህየ ፡ ምስሌከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Gather me seventy men from the elders of Israel, whom thou thyself knowest that they are the elders of the people, and their scribes; and thou shalt bring them to the tabernacle of witness, and they shall stand there with thee.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Gather unto me seventy men of the elders of Israel, whom thou knowest to be the elders of the people, and officers over them; and bring them unto the tabernacle of the congregation, that they may stand there with thee.

verses.geez:
ወእወርድ ፡ ወእትናገር ፡ በህየ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ወእነሥእ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መንፈስ ፡ ዘላዕሌከ ፡ ወኣነብር ፡ ዲቤሆሙ ፡
                  ወይጸውሩ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ክበዶሙ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወኢትሥራሕ ፡ ባሕቲትከ ፡ ሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I will go down, and speak there with thee; and I will take of the spirit that is upon thee, and will put it upon them; and they shall bear together with thee the burden of the people, and thou shalt not bear them alone.
translations.kjv: And I will come down and talk with thee there: and I will take of the spirit which is upon thee, and will put it upon them; and they shall bear the burden of the people with thee, that thou bear it not thyself alone.

verses.geez:
ወለሕዝብኒ ፡ ትብሎሙ ፡ ያንጽሑ ፡ ርእሶሙ ፡ ለጌሠም ፡ ወትበልዑ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ እስመ ፡ በከይክሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  እንዘ ፡ ትብሉ ፡ መኑ ፡ ያበልዐነ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ እስመ ፡ ይኄይሰነ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወይሁበክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ትብልዑ ፡
                  ሥጋ ፡ ወተበልዑ ፡ ሥጋ ።

translations.lxx: And to the people thou shalt say, Purify yourselves for the morrow, and ye shall eat flesh; for ye wept before the Lord, saying, Who shall give us flesh to eat? for it was well with us in Egypt: and the Lord shall allow you to eat flesh, and ye shall eat flesh.
translations.kjv: And say thou unto the people, Sanctify yourselves against to morrow, and ye shall eat flesh: for ye have wept in the ears of the LORD, saying, Who shall give us flesh to eat? for it was well with us in Egypt: therefore the LORD will give you flesh, and ye shall eat.

verses.geez:
አኮ ፡ አሐተ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ዘትበልዑ ፡ ወአኮ ፡ ሰኑየ ፡ ወአኮ ፡ ኀሙሰ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ወአኮ ፡ ዐሡረ ፡ ወአኮ ፡ ዕሥራ ፡
                  መዋዕለ ፤

translations.lxx: Ye shall not eat one day, nor two, nor five days, nor ten days, nor twenty days;
translations.kjv: Ye shall not eat one day, nor two days, nor five days, neither ten days, nor twenty days;

verses.geez:
አላ ፡ እስከ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ትበልዕዎ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይወፅእ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አእናፋቲክሙ ፡ ወይከውነክሙ ፡ ሕምዘ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ ክህድክምዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ውስቴትክሙ ፡ ወበከይክሙ ፡ በቅድሜሁ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ትብሉ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ለነ ፡
                  አውፃእከነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: ye shall eat for a full month, until the flesh come out at your nostrils; and it shall be nausea to you, because ye disobeyed the Lord, who is among you, and wept before him, saying, What had we to do to come out of Egypt?
translations.kjv: But even a whole month, until it come out at your nostrils, and it be loathsome unto you: because that ye have despised the LORD which is among you, and have wept before him, saying, Why came we forth out of Egypt?

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ስሳ ፡ እልፍ ፡ አጋር ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እለ ፡ ውስቴቶሙ ፡ ሀለውኩ ፡ [ወአንተ ፡ ትቤለኒ ፡ እሁቦሙ ፡ ሥጋ
                  ፡] ወይበልዑ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ወርኅ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said, The people among whom I am are six hundred thousand footmen; and thou saidst, I will give them flesh to eat, and they shall eat a whole month.
translations.kjv: And Moses said, The people, among whom I am, are six hundred thousand footmen; and thou hast said, I will give them flesh, that they may eat a whole month.

verses.geez:
ቦኑ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ወአልህምት ፡ ይጠባኅ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ አው ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዓሣተ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ይትጋባእ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይእከሎሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: Shall sheep and oxen be slain for them, and shall it suffice them? or shall all the fish of the sea be gathered together for them, and shall it suffice them?
translations.kjv: Shall the flocks and the herds be slain for them, to suffice them? or shall all the fish of the sea be gathered together for them, to suffice them?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ቦኑ ፡ ኢትክል ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ናሁ ፡ ትሬኢ ፡ እመ ፡ ትረክቦ ፡ ለቃልየ
                  ፡ ወእመ ፡ አልቦ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Shall not the hand of the Lord be fully sufficient? now shalt thou know whether my word shall come to pass to thee or not.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Is the LORD’s hand waxed short? thou shalt see now whether my word shall come to pass unto thee or not.

verses.geez:
ወወፅአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወነገሮሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወአስተጋብአ ፡ ፸ብእሴ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አዕሩጊሆሙ ፡
                  ለሕዝብ ፡ ወአቀሞሙ ፡ አውደ ፡ ደብተራ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses went out, and spoke the words of the Lord to the people; and he gathered seventy men of the elders of the people, and he set them round about the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And Moses went out, and told the people the words of the LORD, and gathered the seventy men of the elders of the people, and set them round about the tabernacle.

verses.geez:
ወወረደ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በደመና ፡ ወተናገሮ ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መንፈስ ፡ ዘላዕሌሁ ፡ ወወደየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ፸ብእሲ
                  ፡ ሊቃናት ፡ ወእምዘ ፡ አዕረፈ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ መንፈስ ፡ ተነበዩ ፡ ወኢተወሰኩ ፡ እንከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord came down in a cloud, and spoke to him, and took of the spirit that was upon him, and put it upon the seventy men that were elders; and when the spirit rested upon them, they prophesied and ceased.
translations.kjv: And the LORD came down in a cloud, and spake unto him, and took of the spirit that was upon him, and gave it unto the seventy elders: and it came to pass, that, when the spirit rested upon them, they prophesied, and did not cease.

verses.geez:
ወተረፉ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ስሙ ፡ ለአሐዱ ፡ ኤልዳድ ፡ ወሞዳድ ፡ ስሙ ፡ ለካልኡ ፡ ወአዕረፈ ፡
                  ላዕሌሆሙኒ ፡ መንፈስ ፡ ወእሙንቱኒ ፡ ተጽሕፉ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወኢመጽኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ወተነበዩ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት
                  ።

translations.lxx: And there were two men left in the camp, the name of the one was Eldad, and the name of the other Modad; and the spirit rested upon them, and these were of the number of them that were enrolled, but they did not come to the tabernacle; and they prophesied in the camp.
translations.kjv: But there remained two of the men in the camp, the name of the one was Eldad, and the name of the other Medad: and the spirit rested upon them; and they were of them that were written, but went not out unto the tabernacle: and they prophesied in the camp.

verses.geez: ወሮጸ ፡ ወሬዛ ፡ ወዜነዎ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ኤልዳድ ፡ ወሞዳድ ፡ ተነበዩ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: And a young man ran and told Moses, and spoke, saying, Eldad and Modad prophesy in the camp.
translations.kjv: And there ran a young man, and told Moses, and said, Eldad and Medad do prophesy in the camp.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ዘነዌ ፡ ዘይቀውም ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ ኅሩዩ ፡ ይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ [ሙሴ ፡] ክልኦሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua the son of Naue, who attended on Moses, the chosen one, said, My lord Moses, forbid them.
translations.kjv: And Joshua the son of Nun, the servant of Moses, one of his young men, answered and said, My lord Moses, forbid them.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ አንተኑ ፡ ትቀንእ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ወመኑ ፡ እምወሀበኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትነበይ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ ሶበ ፡ ወሀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ መንፈሶ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said to him, Art thou jealous on my account? and would that all the Lord's people were prophets; whenever the Lord shall put his spirit upon them.
translations.kjv: And Moses said unto him, Enviest thou for my sake? would God that all the LORD’s people were prophets, and that the LORD would put his spirit upon them!

verses.geez: ወገብአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወአዕሩጊሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And Moses departed into the camp, himself and the elders of Israel.
translations.kjv: And Moses gat him into the camp, he and the elders of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወወፅአ ፡ መንፈስ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወዐደወ ፡ ፍርፍርት ፡ እምነ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወወረዶ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡
                  እስከ ፡ ምሕዋረ ፡ ዕለት ፡ እምነ ፡ አውደ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ እምለፌ ፡ ወእምለፌ ፡ ወተወጥሐ ፡ ካዕበ ፡ እመት ፡ መልዕልተ ፡
                  ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And there went forth a wind from the Lord, and brought quails over from the sea; and it brought them down upon the camp a day's journey on this side, and a day's journey on that side, round about the camp, as it were two cubits from the earth.
translations.kjv: And there went forth a wind from the LORD, and brought quails from the sea, and let them fall by the camp, as it were a day’s journey on this side, and as it were a day’s journey on the other side, round about the camp, and as it were two cubits high upon the face of the earth.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ እንተ ፡ በሳኒታ ፡ ወአለዱ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ፍርፍርተ
                  ፡ ወዘአውሐዱ ፡ አልዶ ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ በቆ[ሮ]ስ ፡ ወሰጥሑ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ወአይበሱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አውደ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the people rose up all the day, and all the night, and all the next day, and gathered quails; he that gathered least, gathered ten measures; and they refreshed themselves round about the camp.
translations.kjv: And the people stood up all that day, and all that night, and all the next day, and they gathered the quails: he that gathered least gathered ten homers: and they spread them all abroad for themselves round about the camp.

verses.geez:
ወእንዘ ፡ ሀለወ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፅረሲሆሙ ፡ እንበለ ፡ ያኅልቅዎ ፡ ተምዕዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡
                  ወቀተሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ በዐቢይ ፡ መቅሠፍት ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: The flesh was yet between their teeth, before it failed, when the Lord was wroth with the people, and the Lord smote the people with a very great plague.
translations.kjv: And while the flesh was yet between their teeth, ere it was chewed, the wrath of the LORD was kindled against the people, and the LORD smote the people with a very great plague.

verses.geez: ወተሰምየ ፡ ስሙ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ መካን ፡ ተዝካረ ፡ ፍትወት ፡ እስመ ፡ ቀበርዎሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ፈተዉ ።

translations.lxx: And the name of that place was called the Graves of Lust; for there they buried the people that lusted.
translations.kjv: And he called the name of that place Kibrothhattaavah: because there they buried the people that lusted.

verses.geez: ወግዕዘ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እምነ ፡ ተዝካረ ፡ ፍትወት ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሴሮት ፡ [ወነበሩ ፡ በአሴሮት ፡]፡

translations.lxx: The people departed from the Graves of Lust to Aseroth; and the people halted at Aseroth.
translations.kjv: And the people journeyed from Kibrothhattaavah unto Hazeroth; and abode at Hazeroth.
